title: RubyMod
description: RubyMod is an open-source mod, which prioritizes sharing its code to help other modders learn.
body:
RubyMod is an open-source mod for the Forge API, which prioritizes sharing its code to help other modders learn.

 It shows a variety of concepts, like:

- Tools

- Armor

- Ores + generation

- Biomes

- Storage blocks

- Food

- Mobs + spawn eggs

- Enchantments

- Basic Fluids

- Potions

- Villager professions

- Redstone components

Fabric support coming soon!
